hero_paragraph: Full Stack Developer with professional experience building production-ready applications using <tech>Next.js, React, TypeScript, Java, Spring Boot and Modern Web Standards.</tech> Passionate about creating performant and scalable web solutions.
about_me: I'm a full-stack developer dedicated to building interactive and user-friendly web experiences. I specialize in engineering fast, responsive, and scalable web applications. My focus is on leveraging proven technologies to deliver everything from pixel-perfect user interfaces to robust backend architectures.
experience_1: Developed and maintained scalable web applications using Next.js, React and TypeScript.
experience_2: Collaborated with designers and backend developers to deliver production-ready features.
experience_3: Integrated REST APIs and optimized application performance and user experience.
experience_4: Built reusable UI components and improved maintainability across projects.
contributed_website_1: One Stop Ecommerce & ERP website which you can do everything from the ground up such as shop opening, selling, staff management, member points system, etc...
contributed_website_2: Fitness/yoga subscription app, offering video-based yoga or wellness content via subscription offer.
maintenance_text: This website is still in maintenance phase, so you can't view the website for now.
featured_projects_subs: A collection of projects showcasing my experience in full-stack development, frontend architecture, state management, API integration, and responsive user interface design.
featured_project_1: Full-stack e-commerce platform featuring product management, shopping cart functionality, authentication, and order processing using Next.js, TypeScript, NextAuth, Prisma , Neon, Paypal
featured_project_2: Created a modern music streaming interface inspired by Deezer using Vue 3 and Pinia.
featured_project_3: Designed and developed a fully responsive travel website using Sass.
featured_project_4: Developed an interactive plant store application with Redux-based state management, shopping cart functionality, and a responsive user interface.
featured_project_5: Developed a complete e-commerce solution using Laravel and Blade.
featured_project_6: Built a mission control dashboard for exploring habitable planets.
